chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 353 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.5838/2025 (1 Rule 10) 3. For hearing of CMA No.5717/2025 (1 Rule 10) 4. For hearing of CMA No.5247/2025 (1 Rule 10) 5. For hearing of CMA No.7635/2025 (S/A) 6. For hearing of main case 13.01.2026 Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Inspector Abdul Hameed of Anti-Corruption Establishment, Khairpur >>>>>..<<<<< In compliance of order dated 02.12.2025, learned AAG Sindh has furnished compliance report, which reflects that in compliance of previous orders of this Court an Enquiry has been initiated by the Anti-Corruption Establishment. At this stage, it is submitted by the learned counsel appearing for petitioner that the purpose of the petition seeking construction and rehabilitation of Schools has been served. In the light of the statement, the instant Constitutional Petition is disposed of along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
